Managed Services
What to do Segments What’s trending Leaders Careers
What to do Segments What’s trending Leaders Careers

Managed services

As organizations strive to optimize cost and accelerate growth, managed services, including business process services (BPS), can help to better prepare them to reinvent operations and drive holistic value at scale.

Why managed services?

1.4x

higher operating margins

2.2x

greater total shareholder returns (three-year)

42%

improvement in agile product and process innovation

34%

better at reducing energy consumption and greenhouse gas emissions

Reinvent with managed services

Close
Managed Data, AI and Automation

Do you have the insights to make real-time decisions?

2x
data-modernization attributes are reported by reinvention-ready organizations
You can’t change what you can’t see. Reinvention-ready companies are twice as likely to have a modern data foundation approach to governance and asset creation with gen AI in mind.
Learn more

Global Capability Centers

Access talent and innovation with global capability centers

Global Capability Centers give your business access to today’s in-demand skills, while encouraging innovation for tomorrow. Keep pace with the 71% of organizations planning to invest in capability centers in the next 12 months.
Learn more
Global Capability Centers

Access talent and innovation with global capability centers

Global Capability Centers give your business access to today’s in-demand skills, while encouraging innovation for tomorrow. Keep pace with the 71% of organizations planning to invest in capability centers in the next 12 months.
Learn more
Close
Application Managed Services

Don’t let application complexity hold you back.

Emerging technologies have led to more application complexity, and disruption is at an all-time high. Integrate cloud and gen AI with new and traditional managed services approaches to simplify for faster value.
Learn more
Application Managed Services

Don’t let application complexity hold you back.

Emerging technologies have led to more application complexity, and disruption is at an all-time high. Integrate cloud and gen AI with new and traditional managed services approaches to simplify for faster value.
Learn more
Close
Infrastructure Managed Services

You can’t build your legacy with legacy IT

Managing today’s IT landscape with yesterday’s tech can be a drag on your reinvention ambitions. Reach your goals, cut spend and see value faster with modern infrastructure managed services.
Learn more
Infrastructure Managed Services

You can’t build your legacy with legacy IT

Managing today’s IT landscape with yesterday’s tech can be a drag on your reinvention ambitions. Reach your goals, cut spend and see value faster with modern infrastructure managed services.

Close
Cybersecurity Managed Services

Is your cybersecurity protecting the business?

88% of boards view cybersecurity as a business risk, not just an IT problem. Fight deepfakes while building trust and resilience with operational security as-a-service.
Learn more
Cybersecurity Managed Services

Is your cybersecurity protecting the business?

88% of boards view cybersecurity as a business risk, not just an IT problem. Fight deepfakes while building trust and resilience with operational security as-a-service.

Operations areas we support

  • Finance operations
    Finance operations

    See all the value your business is creating for today and tomorrow with instant data and insights. Make compliance secure and efficient.

    Read more
  • Supply chain
    Supply chain

    Make life simple for customers with a profitable and sustainable supply network. Make supply more transparent, predictive and disruption-proof.

    Learn more
  • Sourcing & procurement
    Sourcing & procurement

    Find new competitive advantages in sourcing and procurement using AI and automation.

    Learn more
  • Digital engineering & manufacturing
    Digital engineering & manufacturing

    Reimagine products and how they’re made, using data to connect demand to production.

    Learn more
  • Talent and HR
    Talent and HR

    Lead the change: Build reinvention-ready leaders, expand Advanced AI training, and transform HR to unlock workforce potential.

    Learn more
  • Marketing Services
    Marketing Services

    Enhance marketing services with intelligence and efficiency to elevate client engagement and gain a competitive edge.

    Learn more
  • Customer Service Operations
    Customer Service Operations

    Discover how customer service operations is transforming and find out how to build new competitive advantages with AI.

    Learn more
  • Banking
    Banking

    Get ahead of change with digitally enabled operations, from payments to asset management.

    Learn more
  • Insurance
    Insurance

    Build the operations you need to influence member habits and transform your claims experiences.

    Learn more
  • Health
    Health

    Speed up R&D and realize better patient outcomes through digital transformation.

    Learn more
  • Risk and Compliance
    Risk and Compliance

    Protect your business with data and tech in a rapidly evolving regulatory environment.

    Learn more
  • Trust & safety
    Trust & safety

    Discover how trust & safety helps platforms and Generative AI firms build trust, security, and global compliance in complex digital environments.

    Learn more

What’s trending in managed services

View all work
Research Report
Are you ready for autonomous supply chains?

Companies are seeing diminishing returns from classic business efficiency strategies. To create value, supply chains need to be fast, agile and sustainable, not just cost-efficient. Could AI-powered autonomy be the key to unlocking this?

Expand
Research Report
Reinventing Enterprise Operations – How mature operations use Gen AI to support growth

Organizations with highest operations maturity are 3.3x more likely to succeed at scaling high-value gen AI use cases and report 2.5x higher average revenue growth. Operational performance and gen AI enhance each other.

Expand
Case Study
Vodafone pioneers commercialized shared services operations

How the telecom leader is powering its digital transformation with data, AI and new ways of working.

Expand
Research Report
Reinventing Enterprise Operations

of organizations have a unique ability to reinvent enterprise operations and drive 360° value.

Expand
Research Report
The CHRO as a growth executive

The possible premium on top-line productivity that companies stand to gain.

Expand
Research Report
The tech-powered operating model

Accenture details 5 key steps to help companies unlock the full value of their data and technology investment.

Expand
Perspective
AI for everyone

With innovations like ChatGPT dominating headlines, the world is waking up to the transformative potential of generative AI. Find out how AI working side-by-side with people will impact science, business and society itself.

Expand

Awards and recognition

Accenture is named a Leader in Everest Group’s Procurement Outsourcing (PO) Services PEAK Matrix® Assessment 2025

Everest Group has positioned Accenture as the highest-designated Leader on both the Market Impact axis and the Vision and Capability axis. Accenture is also a Star Performer in this report, reflecting our significant growth in this area.

Learn more

Accenture is named a Leader in Everest Group’s Clinical and Care Management Operations PEAK Matrix® Assessment 2025

Everest Group has positioned Accenture as a Leader in its Clinical and Care Management Operations PEAK Matrix® Assessment 2025 which assessed 20 service providers.

Learn more

Accenture Named Overall Leader in the Group Marketing Services Peak Matrix™ Assessment 2023, by Everest Group

Accenture follows a delivery model where agencies under Accenture Song handle judgment-intensive processes such as creative, CX strategy, and media, while offshore and nearshore facilities under Accenture Operations manage delivery – enabling it to offer economical and localized services.

Learn more

A Leader in Mortgage Operations

Everest Group names Accenture a leader for developing complete digital solutions, alongside its strong reputation in supporting front- to back-office operations for its mortgage clients with differentiated services across the entire mortgage operations value chain.

Learn more

A Leader in Life Science Sales and Marketing IT Outsourcing Services

“Highly experienced vendors like Accenture are offering increasingly sophisticated ITO models for processes while enabling their clients to focus on their core competencies — improve outcomes for doctors and patients alike."

Learn more

A Leader in IDC MarketScape for Worldwide Cloud Professional Services

“Accenture — with its strong industry knowledge, industry cloud offers, and breadth of technology services that span from consulting all the way to managed services — can fulfill cloud technology implementation needs at a global scale”

Learn more
